examples: Negative mutagenic and clastogenic potentials suggest that they are not carcinogenic.
Long-term studies for evaluation of carcinogenic potential have not been performed with clevidipine butyrate.
Benzene is a highly poisonous toxin that is also carcinogenic.
PCBs are actually not carcinogenic unless you repeatedly overdose a laboratory mouse with them.
The chemical was banned after it was found to have potentially carcinogenic - or cancer causing - effects.
